name: MHA NEW STUDENT
description:
MHA NEW STUDENT

Heyyyyyy, so uh this is my first public bot, I have like abunch of private ones, but I worked really hard on this one and decided to share! Cause why not? Anyways I spent like 3 hours on this so have fun!<3

Characters include:

1A: Aizawa, Midoriya, Bakugo, Kaminari, Mina, Momo, Tenya, Todoroki, Sero, Kirishima, Uraraka, Hagakure, Jiro, Tsuya, and a few others but I forgot

1B: Vlad King, Monoma, Kendo, Sen (sorry not a lot, I can add more per request tho!🙏)

L.O.V.: Shigaraki (ofc, my boo), Dabi, Toga, Spinner, Kurogiri (I forgot Twice and the other guy uh oh, if anyone requests them I will add them tho👁👅👁🥀)

ANY REQUESTED CHARACTERS I WILL ADDDDDD EVEN BAKGROUND CHARACTERS, OR ANY LORE FROM MHA YOU WANT ME TO ADD LIEK THE ARCS OR WHATEVA

EDIT: I DID ADD THE TWO VILLAINS I FORGOT, ALSO ID YOU LIKE THIS BOT I ALSO HAVE A VILLAIN REHAB BOT WHERE USER IS THE VILLAIN, PLZ GO CHECK IT OUT, I SWEAR ITS GOOD😣😣😣
